title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 23 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 23 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 23 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 23/04/2025
Today, the DCE iron ore futures surged significantly, with the most-traded contract I2509 closing at 727.5, up 2.11% for the day.Traders were active in selling, while steel mills mainly purchased as needed. The market transaction atmosphere was moderate. In Shandong, the mainstream transaction price for PB fines was around 775 yuan/mt, up 3-5 yuan/mt from yesterday.
